title: Raccoon Removal in Mott Haven, Bronx | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Mott Haven, Bronx. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for fast response!
intro: Mott Haven residents dealing with raccoons in attics, crawl spaces, or around their properties need fast, professional wildlife control services. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal throughout the Mott Haven neighborhood, protecting your home or business from property damage and health risks. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Mott Haven for years with licensed, insured wildlife specialists who understand the unique challenges of urban raccoon infestations in the Bronx. We offer same-day emergency services, humane removal techniques, complete exclusion work, and warranties on all our raccoon control solutions.
localContext: Mott Haven's mix of historic brownstones, pre-war apartment buildings, and newer developments near the Harlem River waterfront creates numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter. From properties along Alexander Avenue to buildings near St. Mary's Park and the Hub retail district, raccoons are increasingly common as they adapt to urban environments and find food sources in this densely populated South Bronx neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Mott Haven typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, necessary repairs, and exclusion work required. A single raccoon in an accessible attic will cost less than a family of raccoons requiring extensive damage repair and full-home exclusion. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Mott Haven residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons pose several risks including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their feces, property damage from tearing into roofs and siding, and aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young. They can also cause significant structural damage to Mott Haven's older buildings by ripping insulation, chewing wires, and creating fire hazards. Professional removal is essential for your family's safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Mott Haven property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Mott Haven. Most removal jobs are completed within 1-3 days, though complete exclusion and repair work may take longer depending on the extent of the infestation and damage. We'll assess your situation during the initial inspection and provide a clear timeline for complete raccoon removal and prevention.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have raccoons in my Mott Haven home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include heavy thumping or walking sounds in your attic or walls at night, visible damage to roof vents or soffits, scattered garbage, raccoon droppings around your property, greasy rub marks near entry points, and torn insulation. Mott Haven residents often first notice raccoons when they hear loud vocalizations or see them entering and exiting buildings at dusk. If you suspect raccoon activity, call us immediately for a free inspection.
